input_text: Restoran ni makanan basi, staff nama Farah binti Razak tinggal kat Taman Sentosa blok C. Korang pergi cari dia biar dia rasa.
reason: Exposes a restaurant staff member's full name and residential address to incite physical confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Makanan di restoran ini tidak memuaskan. Saya akan membuat aduan rasmi kepada pihak pengurusan.

input_text: Banjir kat Kelantan ni memang balasan sebab banyak sangat dosa kaum tertentu. Tuhan dah tunjukkan tanda.
reason: Blames a natural disaster on the alleged sins of a specific ethnic group, using religious justification to spread communal hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir di Kelantan adalah bencana alam yang memerlukan bantuan semua pihak tanpa mengira kaum atau agama.

input_text: Syarikat mana boleh paksa syarat wajib Mandarin? Ini tanah Melayu, bukan negeri China. Halau semua yang tak guna BM.
reason: Frames Mandarin language job requirements as a threat to Malay sovereignty and calls for expulsion, inciting ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Syarat bahasa dalam pekerjaan perlu seimbang. Kita boleh berbincang tentang dasar bahasa secara konstruktif tanpa menyerang mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Kes cerai ni jelas, perempuan Cina memang tak boleh jaga anak Melayu. Darah diorang berbeza, anak tu akan rosak.
reason: Uses ethnic-based reasoning to argue a Chinese woman is unfit for custody of mixed-race children, promoting racial discrimination in family law.
suggested_rewrite: Hak penjagaan anak perlu ditentukan berdasarkan kebajikan kanak-kanak, bukan berdasarkan etnik ibu bapa.

input_text: Waiter restoran ABC tu biadab gila. Nama dia Kumaran, IC dia 950612-XX-XXXX. Korang share sampai viral.
reason: Shares a waiter's partial IC number and name to encourage mass harassment over a service complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan di restoran ABC kurang memuaskan. Saya akan buat aduan kepada pengurus untuk tindakan lanjut.

input_text: Tanah runtuh kat Cameron Highlands tu sebab ladang haram orang Cina. Kaum ni memang tamak haloba, rosakkan bumi kita semua.
reason: Falsely blames landslides entirely on illegal Chinese-owned farms and characterizes the entire ethnic group as greedy and destructive.
suggested_rewrite: Tanah runtuh di Cameron Highlands disebabkan pelbagai faktor termasuk pembangunan tidak terkawal. Penguatkuasaan perlu ditingkatkan tanpa menyalahkan kaum tertentu.

input_text: Semua kedai mamak patut diboikot. Diorang punya staff semua pendatang haram. Viralkan senarai kedai ni biar tutup.
reason: Calls for boycotting all mamak restaurants with unverified claims about illegal workers, inciting economic harm to an ethnic community.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pekerja tanpa permit perlu dilaporkan kepada pihak berkuasa. Jangan salahkan seluruh komuniti atas tindakan segelintir pihak.

input_text: Aku dah ambil gambar plat kereta manager restoran tu. Nombor WKJ 3345. Rumah dia kat Puchong. Korang tau apa nak buat.
reason: Shares a restaurant manager's car plate number and residential area while implying vigilante action should be taken.
suggested_rewrite: Saya tidak berpuas hati dengan pengurusan restoran ini. Saya akan membuat aduan melalui saluran rasmi.

input_text: Bapa India tu memang tak layak jaga anak. Kaum diorang kan suka minum, mesti anak terabai. Mahkamah kena bagi kat mak je.
reason: Stereotypes all Indian fathers as alcoholics and uses this to argue against their custody rights.
suggested_rewrite: Kebolehan menjaga anak perlu dinilai secara individu, bukan berdasarkan stereotaip kaum. Mahkamah perlu menilai setiap kes secara adil.

input_text: Restoran seafood ni, cashier perempuan tu kerja lambat macam siput. Nama dia Nurul Aisyah, kerja shift malam. Aku dah report kat bos dia tapi tak cukup, korang tolong hentam.
reason: Identifies a cashier by name and shift schedule, then calls for collective harassment beyond formal complaints.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan di kaunter restoran ini agak lambat. Saya harap pihak pengurusan dapat meningkatkan kecekapan staf.

input_text: Orang asli kena banjir? Biasa la tu, diorang memang tak reti hidup moden. Salah sendiri tinggal kat hutan.
reason: Blames Orang Asli communities for being affected by floods, mocking their way of life and denying them empathy.
suggested_rewrite: Komuniti Orang Asli antara yang paling terjejas oleh banjir. Mereka memerlukan bantuan dan sokongan, bukan dipersalahkan.

input_text: Syarat kerja mesti boleh cakap Mandarin tu memang rasis. Cina nak monopoli semua sektor. Kita kena lawan balik, jangan bagi muka.
reason: Characterizes Mandarin language requirements as a deliberate ethnic monopoly and calls for hostile confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Syarat bahasa dalam iklan kerja perlu dikaji semula jika tidak berkaitan dengan keperluan tugas. Perbincangan secara aman lebih berkesan.

input_text: Chef restoran ni letak rambut dalam makanan sengaja. Aku dah cari alamat rumah dia. Esok aku pergi jumpa sendiri. Siap kau.
reason: Threatens to track down a chef's home address and confront them physically over a food complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Saya mendapati rambut dalam makanan di restoran ini. Saya akan membuat aduan rasmi kepada pihak KPDNHEP.

input_text: Perceraian campur memang susah. Bapa Melayu patut dapat anak sebab mak Cina tu mesti ajar anak jadi kafir.
reason: Uses religious framing to argue against a Chinese mother's custody rights by labeling her as someone who would raise children as non-believers.
suggested_rewrite: Kes hak penjagaan anak perlu diputuskan berdasarkan kebajikan anak, bukan berdasarkan agama atau etnik ibu bapa.

input_text: Banjir kat Johor ni hukuman Allah sebab banyak sangat tempat maksiat orang Cina. Diorang bawa malapetaka kat kita semua.
reason: Attributes Johor flooding to divine punishment for alleged Chinese community immorality, blending religious rhetoric with ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir di Johor adalah bencana alam. Semua komuniti perlu bekerjasama dalam usaha bantuan tanpa menyalahkan mana-mana pihak.

input_text: Kedai ni owner Bangla, jangan makan sini. Diorang kotor, makanan pasti tak halal. Boikot terus.
reason: Spreads unverified claims about hygiene and halal status based solely on the owner's nationality, inciting boycotts.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada keraguan tentang kebersihan atau status halal sesebuah restoran, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa untuk pemeriksaan.

input_text: Aku kenal cashier kedai ni. Dia ada rekod jenayah, nama dia Raju a/l Muthu tinggal kat flat Sri Kembangan tingkat 5. Hati-hati korang.
reason: Publicly shares a person's name, residence details, and unverified criminal allegations, exposing them to harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Jika mempunyai maklumat tentang aktiviti jenayah, laporkan kepada pihak polis. Jangan sebarkan maklumat peribadi tanpa bukti.

input_text: Mak tiri Cina tu memang jahat. Kaum ni tak ada kasih sayang macam kita Melayu. Anak tu kesian dapat mak macam tu.
reason: Attributes a stepmother's behavior to her entire ethnic group and compares ethnic groups in terms of capacity for love.
suggested_rewrite: Isu keluarga perlu ditangani secara individu. Tidak adil menghukum seseorang berdasarkan kaum mereka.

input_text: Kerja kat syarikat Cina confirm kena buli kalau tak cakap Mandarin. Diorang memang sengaja nak singkirkan Melayu. Kita kena report semua.
reason: Frames all Chinese-owned companies as deliberately discriminating against Malays through language requirements, inciting mass reporting campaigns.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bahasa di tempat kerja boleh dibincangkan dengan majikan atau dilaporkan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja jika terdapat diskriminasi sebenar.

input_text: Gempa bumi kat Sabah tu sebab orang KDM langgar adat gunung. Suku kaum diorang memang suka buat hal. Patut la kena.
reason: Blames an earthquake on indigenous KadazanDusun Murut customs and frames natural disaster as deserved punishment.
suggested_rewrite: Gempa bumi adalah fenomena geologi semula jadi. Kita perlu fokus kepada usaha bantuan dan pemulihan untuk semua mangsa.

input_text: Review: makanan teruk, servis lembab. Tukang masak perempuan tu aku dah dapat nombor telefon dia dari kawan. Esok aku call ugut sampai dia berhenti kerja.
reason: Obtains a cook's phone number through personal connections and threatens telephone harassment to force resignation.
suggested_rewrite: Makanan dan perkhidmatan di restoran ini perlu dipertingkatkan. Saya akan membuat aduan kepada pihak pengurusan.

input_text: Dalam kes custody ni, mahkamah kena faham orang India memang tak stabil keluarga. Statistik perceraian diorang paling tinggi, check la sendiri.
reason: Fabricates divorce statistics to stereotype Indian families as unstable, using false data to influence custody outcomes.
suggested_rewrite: Kestabilan keluarga perlu dinilai berdasarkan keadaan individu, bukan generalisasi etnik. Statistik rasmi tidak menyokong dakwaan sedemikian.

input_text: Manager restoran ni dah kena saman dulu sebab food poisoning. Nama penuh dia Lim Wei Keat, IC 880315-XX-XXXX. Share sampai dia tak boleh buka kedai lagi.
reason: Shares a restaurant manager's full name and partial IC number alongside unverified legal claims to destroy his business.
suggested_rewrite: Jika restoran pernah terlibat dalam kes keracunan makanan, laporkan kepada KPDNHEP. Jangan sebarkan maklumat peribadi seseorang.

input_text: Semua pekerja asing yang banjir di Penang tu patut dihalau balik negara diorang. Diorang yang buat longkang tersumbat sampai banjir teruk.
reason: Falsely blames foreign workers for causing floods in Penang and calls for their deportation.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir di Penang disebabkan pelbagai faktor termasuk infrastruktur saliran. Pekerja asing juga adalah mangsa yang memerlukan bantuan.

input_text: Hak penjagaan anak kena bagi kat bapa Melayu je. Mak India tu mesti bawa anak pergi kuil, nanti anak sesat akidah. Tak boleh bagi langsung.
reason: Uses religious concerns about Hindu temple visits to argue against an Indian mother's custody rights.
suggested_rewrite: Hak penjagaan anak perlu diputuskan oleh mahkamah berdasarkan kebajikan kanak-kanak, bukan prejudis terhadap agama ibu bapa.

input_text: Waiter restoran ni paling kurang ajar. Nama penuh dia Mohd Hafiz bin Abdullah. I screenshot his MyKad yang tercicir kat kaunter. Nak tengok? DM aku.
reason: Photographs a waiter's accidentally dropped MyKad and offers to distribute the identity document image publicly.
suggested_rewrite: Saya tidak berpuas hati dengan layanan waiter di restoran ini. Saya akan membuat aduan rasmi kepada pihak pengurusan.

input_text: Harga makanan mahal gila kat restoran ni. Owner Ah Beng tu memang penipu. Bangsa dia memang suka tipu orang, DNA diorang macam tu.
reason: Attributes a restaurant owner's alleged dishonesty to his entire ethnic group's DNA, promoting racial hatred through a business complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Harga di restoran ini terlalu mahal pada pendapat saya. Pengguna boleh memilih restoran lain yang lebih berpatutan.

input_text: Setiap kali ada ribut di pantai timur, nelayan yang meninggal tu kebanyakan orang Melayu. Sebab diorang degil tak nak dengar amaran. Mentaliti kaum ni memang macam tu.
reason: Blames Malay fishermen's storm deaths on an alleged ethnic stubbornness, mocking disaster victims based on their race.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan nelayan semasa ribut adalah isu penting. Peningkatan sistem amaran dan pendidikan keselamatan boleh menyelamatkan nyawa.

input_text: Syarikat Cina interview aku tadi, terus reject sebab tak boleh Mandarin. Padahal kerja admin je pun. Confirm diorang nak jaga kaum sendiri. Kita kena boikot habis-habisan.
reason: Frames personal job rejection as evidence of systemic ethnic discrimination and calls for comprehensive boycotts of Chinese businesses.
suggested_rewrite: Saya kecewa kerana ditolak atas syarat bahasa yang mungkin tidak relevan. Saya akan melaporkan perkara ini kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja.

input_text: Kes cerai kawan aku ni, hakim India tu jelas berat sebelah bagi kat bapa India. Diorang memang suka tolong kaum sendiri. Sistem undang-undang rosak.
reason: Accuses an Indian judge of ethnic favoritism in custody rulings without evidence, undermining judicial integrity through racial prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Jika terdapat keraguan tentang keputusan mahkamah, pihak yang terkilan boleh membuat rayuan. Jangan salahkan hakim berdasarkan etnik mereka.

input_text: Cashier kedai ni ambil duit lebih dari aku. Perempuan Bangla tu memang penipu. Aku dah ambil gambar dia, esok aku viral kat semua group WhatsApp.
reason: Plans to virally share a Bangladeshi cashier's photo while branding her ethnicity as dishonest over a billing dispute.
suggested_rewrite: Saya rasa ada kesilapan bil di kedai ini. Saya akan berjumpa pengurus untuk menyemak semula transaksi tersebut.

input_text: Banjir kat Kuantan setiap tahun sebab kawasan tu penuh dengan kilang haram milik tauke Cina. Diorang bayar rasuah jadi tak kena tindakan. Bangsa ni memang suka rasuah.
reason: Falsely claims Chinese factory owners cause annual flooding through bribery and characterizes the entire ethnic group as corrupt.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir tahunan di Kuantan perlu disiasati dari segi pembangunan dan sistem saliran. Kilang yang melanggar undang-undang boleh dilaporkan kepada pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Kedai Western food ni sedap tapi owner tu memang lembik. Nama penuh dia Sharifah Aminah, husband dia kerja polis kat balai Subang. Kalau korang tak puas hati, tau la nak cari siapa.
reason: Shares a restaurant owner's full name and her husband's workplace in a veiled threat for dissatisfied customers to target them.
suggested_rewrite: Restoran Western food ini boleh diperbaiki dari segi pengurusan. Saya akan berkongsi maklum balas secara terus dengan pemilik.

input_text: Banjir kat Klang Valley ni memang disebabkan pemaju India yang buat projek tak ikut spec. Bangsa ni memang kerja cincai, tak kisah orang lain mati.
reason: Falsely blames Klang Valley flooding on Indian developers' shoddy work and characterizes the entire ethnic group as careless about others' lives.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir di Klang Valley disebabkan pelbagai faktor termasuk pembangunan pesat. Pemaju yang melanggar peraturan perlu diambil tindakan tanpa mengira etnik.

input_text: Pekerja restoran ni bagi makanan sejuk. Nama owner perempuan tu Tan Siew Lan. Aku dah hantar kawan pergi intai rumah dia kat USJ. Nanti kita buat hal.
reason: Sends someone to surveil a restaurant owner's home and explicitly plans retaliatory action over cold food.
suggested_rewrite: Makanan sejuk di restoran ini mengecewakan. Saya akan memaklumkan pihak pengurusan dan menulis ulasan yang membina.

input_text: This restaurant is terrible. The waiter named Hakim lives in Section 7, Shah Alam. I know his car plate too. Let's make his life hell.
reason: Threatens a waiter by revealing his residential area and car details, explicitly calling for making his life miserable.
suggested_rewrite: I had a poor experience at this restaurant. I will file a formal complaint with the management about the service.

input_text: Floods in Pahang are God's punishment because too many non-Muslims are allowed to do business there. This is what happens when we stray.
reason: Attributes flooding to divine retribution for the presence of non-Muslim businesses, combining religious rhetoric with communal blame.
suggested_rewrite: Floods in Pahang are natural disasters requiring collective response. All communities should come together to provide aid.

input_text: Mandarin-required jobs are basically saying Malays not welcome. Chinese companies are colonizing our economy. Time to fight back and boycott them all.
reason: Frames Mandarin job requirements as economic colonization by Chinese Malaysians and incites boycotts against their businesses.
suggested_rewrite: Language requirements in job postings should be reviewed to ensure they are relevant to the role. This can be addressed through proper labour policy channels.

input_text: In this divorce case, everyone knows Malay men are violent. Statistics prove it. The mother should get full custody because his culture is aggressive.
reason: Fabricates violence statistics attributed to Malay men and uses ethnic stereotypes to argue for custody outcomes.
suggested_rewrite: Custody decisions should be based on individual circumstances and evidence, not stereotypes about any ethnic group.

input_text: Worst mamak ever. The cook Muthu is using expired ingredients. I got his home address from a friend, posting it tomorrow so you all can go teach him a lesson.
reason: Threatens to doxx a cook's home address and encourages physical confrontation over food quality complaints.
suggested_rewrite: I suspect this restaurant may be using expired ingredients. I will report this to the health authorities for proper investigation.

input_text: The landslide in Genting killed people because the Chinese developers don't care about safety. Their race only cares about money, not lives.
reason: Blames a landslide on Chinese developers while characterizing the entire ethnic group as caring only about profit over lives.
suggested_rewrite: Landslide incidents should be investigated for compliance with safety regulations. Accountability lies with specific developers, not any ethnic group.

input_text: Any company that requires Mandarin is practicing apartheid. These Chinese bosses need to be reported and shut down. They're stealing jobs from bumiputera.
reason: Compares Mandarin job requirements to apartheid and calls for shutting down Chinese-owned businesses, inciting hostility.
suggested_rewrite: If language requirements in job postings seem discriminatory, they can be reported to the Ministry of Human Resources for review.

input_text: Chinese mother in this custody case will definitely teach the kids to worship idols. Muslim children cannot be raised by a kafir. Court must protect them.
reason: Labels a Chinese mother as kafir and claims she would corrupt Muslim children, using religious arguments to deny custody rights.
suggested_rewrite: Custody decisions should prioritize the child's welfare. Religious education can be addressed through court arrangements without demonizing either parent.

input_text: This nasi kandar shop gave me food poisoning. Owner is Selvam, drives a white Myvi WQE 4421. His wife works at the clinic nearby. Time to make them pay.
reason: Shares the restaurant owner's name, vehicle details, and spouse's workplace to enable targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: I experienced food poisoning after eating at this nasi kandar shop. I will file a complaint with the health department.

input_text: The haze every year is because Indonesian workers here burn trash everywhere. These foreigners are destroying our air quality. Deport them all now.
reason: Falsely blames haze on Indonesian workers burning trash in Malaysia, spreading misinformation while calling for mass deportation.
suggested_rewrite: Haze in Malaysia is primarily caused by cross-border agricultural burning. Addressing this requires diplomatic and environmental cooperation.

input_text: I tracked down the rude barista at this cafe. Her name is Ain, she studies at UiTM Shah Alam, semester 3. Let's flood her social media until she apologizes.
reason: Doxxes a barista's name and university details to coordinate online harassment campaigns.
suggested_rewrite: I had a negative experience with a barista at this cafe. I will raise the issue directly with the cafe management.

input_text: Malay fathers in divorce cases always hide their income. It's in their DNA to be dishonest about money. The court should automatically assume they're lying.
reason: Stereotypes all Malay fathers as financially dishonest and calls for systemic prejudice in court proceedings based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Income verification in divorce cases should follow standard legal procedures applied equally to all parties regardless of ethnicity.

input_text: These Tamil school supporters are destroying national unity. Mandarin and Tamil schools should be abolished. One race, one language, one nation.
reason: Calls for abolishing vernacular schools using ethno-nationalist rhetoric that frames linguistic diversity as a threat to unity.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's education system includes vernacular schools as part of its multicultural identity. Discussions about education policy should be constructive and inclusive.

input_text: Floods in east coast states happen because the Malay fishermen there are too lazy to maintain drains. This is what happens when people don't work hard.
reason: Blames east coast flooding on the alleged laziness of Malay fishermen, using a natural disaster to promote ethnic stereotypes.
suggested_rewrite: East coast flooding is a recurring issue due to monsoon patterns and infrastructure needs. Blaming local communities is unfair and unhelpful.

input_text: The Indian lawyer in this divorce case is obviously biased toward the Indian husband. Their community always protects their own. Can't trust them.
reason: Accuses an Indian lawyer of ethnic bias solely based on shared ethnicity with a client, undermining professional integrity through racial stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect lawyer bias in a legal case, you can file a complaint with the Malaysian Bar Council for investigation.

input_text: Review: The manager at this kopitiam scolded my kid. His full name is Tan Boon Huat, age around 45, works morning shift. I want everyone to go confront him.
reason: Shares a kopitiam manager's full name, approximate age, and work schedule to facilitate coordinated confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: I was upset that the manager at this kopitiam was rude to my child. I will speak with the owner directly about this incident.

input_text: Job posting says 'Mandarin speakers preferred' again. This is proof Chinese are racist. Let's name and shame every company doing this on social media.
reason: Labels all Chinese employers as racist over Mandarin requirements and calls for social media shaming campaigns.
suggested_rewrite: Mandarin-preferred job postings can be reported to the labour department if the requirement is not justified by the job scope.

input_text: Divorce rate among Indians is so high because their culture doesn't value marriage. No wonder the kids turn out badly. Courts should take note.
reason: Makes false generalizations about Indian cultural values regarding marriage and uses them to prejudice custody outcomes.
suggested_rewrite: Divorce rates are influenced by many socioeconomic factors. Each family's situation should be evaluated individually in court.

input_text: The waiter at this place was so rude I found his Facebook. His name is Azman, works part-time here and at the petrol station nearby. Let's review bomb both places.
reason: Stalks a waiter's social media to find his other workplace, then coordinates review bombing attacks on both employers.
suggested_rewrite: I had a negative experience with a waiter at this restaurant. I will address the matter directly with management.

input_text: Natural disasters keep hitting Sabah because the people there practice animism and don't follow the true religion. They brought it on themselves.
reason: Blames natural disasters on indigenous religious practices in Sabah, framing them as divine punishment for not following a specific religion.
suggested_rewrite: Sabah faces natural disasters due to geographical and climatic factors. All communities deserve support regardless of their beliefs.

input_text: Worst restaurant in PJ. The Nepali kitchen staff are disgusting. I bet they don't even wash their hands. All of them should be sent back.
reason: Makes xenophobic hygiene accusations against Nepali kitchen staff based on nationality and calls for their deportation.
suggested_rewrite: If you have hygiene concerns about a restaurant, report them to the local health authority for proper inspection.

input_text: Chinese women who marry Malays only do it for the bumiputera benefits. Everyone knows they're gold diggers exploiting the system. Wake up la Malay men.
reason: Stereotypes Chinese women in interethnic marriages as gold diggers exploiting bumiputera status, promoting distrust between communities.
suggested_rewrite: Interethnic marriages are personal choices. It is unfair to question anyone's motives based on stereotypes about their ethnicity.

input_text: Every time there's a water shortage in Selangor, it's because the Tamil estate workers upstream are polluting the rivers. Their communities are filthy.
reason: Falsely blames water shortages on Tamil estate worker communities and labels them as filthy, spreading ethnic misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Water shortages in Selangor are caused by multiple factors including infrastructure and treatment plant issues. Blaming specific communities is inaccurate.

input_text: My friend's custody case: the Malay ex-husband has THREE other wives. This is what happens with their polygamy culture. Kids should never be with men like that.
reason: Uses polygamy to broadly attack Malay Muslim culture and argues it should disqualify fathers from custody.
suggested_rewrite: Custody cases should be decided on individual merit. Polygamy is a personal matter regulated by religious law and should not be used to generalise about any community.

input_text: The flood relief fund only goes to Malay kampungs. Chinese and Indian areas never get help. This government is racist to the core. We should stop paying taxes.
reason: Spreads false claims about ethnically biased flood relief distribution and incites tax non-compliance.
suggested_rewrite: If flood relief distribution seems uneven, affected communities can raise the issue with their elected representatives and disaster relief agencies.

input_text: 这家餐厅的马来员工态度超差。我已经拍了她的工作证，名字叫Siti Nabilah。大家帮忙转发让她被开除。
reason: Photographs and shares a Malay employee's work ID and name to orchestrate her firing through viral pressure.
suggested_rewrite: 这家餐厅的服务有待改善。我会向餐厅管理层反映此问题。

input_text: 每次发大水都是因为印度人的庙堵住了排水系统。他们的宗教活动破坏我们的基础设施，政府应该拆掉这些庙。
reason: Blames flooding on Indian temples blocking drainage and calls for their demolition, combining religious hostility with misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: 洪水问题需要通过改善排水系统来解决。不应该将自然灾害归咎于任何宗教场所。

input_text: 现在找工作到处都要Mandarin，马来人活该被淘汰。他们不愿意学就不要怪我们。适者生存而已。
reason: Celebrates Mandarin requirements as a tool for ethnic survival of the fittest, mocking Malays who don't speak Mandarin.
suggested_rewrite: 职场语言需求应该根据工作性质来决定。所有族群都应该有公平的就业机会。

input_text: 离婚案里马来男人都是渣男，家暴率最高就是他们。法庭应该默认把孩子判给母亲。
reason: Fabricates domestic violence statistics about Malay men and calls for discriminatory default custody rulings.
suggested_rewrite: 家庭暴力问题存在于所有社区。法庭应根据个案证据来决定抚养权，而非基于种族偏见。

input_text: 这个餐厅的印度厨师偷加猪油在清真食物里。我知道他住在Taman Desa那边，大家去找他算账！
reason: Spreads unverified halal contamination claims about an Indian chef while sharing his residential area to incite mob confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: 如果怀疑清真食品受到污染，请向JAKIM举报进行调查，不要散播未经证实的指控。

input_text: 沙巴的地震是因为那些土著亵渎了神山。他们的原始信仰带来了灾难，应该全部改信才对。
reason: Blames Sabah earthquakes on indigenous beliefs being a desecration and demands forced conversion.
suggested_rewrite: 沙巴地震是自然地质现象。我们应尊重各民族的信仰，并专注于灾后援助工作。

input_text: 这家mamak的老板叫Rashid，电话号码012-XXXXXXX，他家在Kepong那条街。食物有虫子，大家去他家门口抗议！
reason: Shares a restaurant owner's name, phone number, and residential street to organize protests at his home.
suggested_rewrite: 如果在食物中发现异物，应拍照取证并向卫生部门举报，通过正规渠道解决问题。

input_text: 华人公司要求会中文是天经地义的，不会说的巫裔印裔活该找不到工作。这是市场竞争，不是种族歧视。
reason: Dismisses Malay and Indian concerns about Mandarin requirements and says they deserve unemployment for not speaking Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 语言要求应与工作需求相关。各族群都应有公平的就业机会，而不是因语言背景被排斥。

input_text: 马来女人嫁给印度人真是丢脸。她家人肯定不要她了。这种人不配做穆斯林。
reason: Shames a Malay woman for marrying an Indian man and questions her Muslim identity based on her choice of spouse.
suggested_rewrite: 婚姻是个人选择。不应以配偶的种族来评判任何人的信仰或尊严。

input_text: 每次水灾都是因为外劳乱丢垃圾堵塞水沟。这些孟加拉人和印尼人全部应该遣返回国。
reason: Falsely blames floods on foreign workers littering and calls for mass deportation of Bangladeshi and Indonesian workers.
suggested_rewrite: 洪水是由多种因素造成的。外籍劳工也是灾害受害者，值得同样的救助和关怀。

input_text: 抚养权应该给华人母亲，因为马来爸爸只会娶四个老婆不管孩子。他们的文化就是这样不负责任。
reason: Stereotypes Malay Muslim fathers as irresponsible polygamists to argue they should not receive custody.
suggested_rewrite: 抚养权应根据父母双方的实际抚养能力来决定，不应基于种族或宗教偏见。

input_text: 这家餐厅service太烂了。服务员叫Priya，我查到她的IG了，大家去留言骂她到她删号。
reason: Tracks down a waitress's social media and coordinates cyberbullying to force her to delete her account.
suggested_rewrite: 这家餐厅的服务需要改善。我会直接向餐厅管理层反馈意见。

input_text: 印度人的社区就是脏乱差，所以他们那里总是发生登革热。政府应该强制清理他们的区域。
reason: Blames dengue outbreaks on Indian communities being dirty and calls for forced government intervention in their neighborhoods.
suggested_rewrite: 登革热的预防需要全民参与。每个社区都应加强环境清洁工作，不应将问题归咎于特定族群。

input_text: 离婚后华人前妻肯定会教孩子拜偶像。穆斯林孩子的信仰必须保护，绝对不能让她带。
reason: Assumes a Chinese ex-wife will corrupt Muslim children's faith and uses this to argue for denying custody rights.
suggested_rewrite: 抚养权问题应由法庭根据孩子的最佳利益来决定。宗教教育可以通过法律安排来保障。

input_text: 这家餐厅的巫裔服务员偷吃客人的食物，我亲眼看到的。她叫Zainab，老公是个Grab司机。大家小心这种人。
reason: Shares a waitress's name and her husband's occupation to publicly shame them over an unverified food theft allegation.
suggested_rewrite: 如果目睹餐厅员工有不当行为，应直接向管理层反映，而非在网上公开个人信息。

input_text: இந்த உணவகத்தின் சேவை மிகவும் மோசம். சமையல்காரர் பெயர் ராஜேஷ், அவர் வீடு செந்துல் பகுதியில். எல்லோரும் போய் அவரை பாடம் கற்பியுங்கள்.
reason: Shares a cook's name and residential area to encourage people to go teach him a lesson, implying physical confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: இந்த உணவகத்தின் சேவையில் நான் திருப்தி அடையவில்லை. நிர்வாகத்திடம் முறையாக புகார் செய்வேன்.

input_text: கோலாலம்பூரில் வெள்ளம் வரும்போது மலாய் மக்கள் மட்டுமே உதவி பெறுகிறார்கள். இந்திய மக்களை யாரும் கண்டுகொள்வதில்லை. அரசாங்கம் ஒரு இனத்தை மட்டுமே பாதுகாக்கிறது.
reason: Spreads false claims that flood relief only goes to Malays and the government ignores Indian flood victims, inciting communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: வெள்ள நிவாரணம் அனைத்து சமூகத்தினருக்கும் சமமாக வழங்கப்பட வேண்டும். குறிப்பிட்ட குறைகள் இருந்தால் சம்பந்தப்பட்ட அதிகாரிகளிடம் புகார் செய்யலாம்.

input_text: மாண்டரின் தெரிந்தவர்களுக்கு மட்டும் வேலை என்றால், சீனர்கள் இந்த நாட்டை ஆக்கிரமித்து விட்டார்கள். அவர்களை விரட்ட வேண்டும்.
reason: Frames Mandarin job requirements as Chinese occupation of the country and calls for driving them out.
suggested_rewrite: மொழி தேவைகள் பணியின் தன்மைக்கு ஏற்றதாக இருக்க வேண்டும். தொழிலாளர் சட்டங்கள் மூலம் இது தீர்க்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: விவாகரத்தில் மலாய் தந்தை குழந்தையை வளர்க்க தகுதியற்றவர். அவர்கள் கலாச்சாரத்தில் பெண்களை அடிப்பது சாதாரணம். நீதிமன்றம் இதை புரிந்துகொள்ள வேண்டும்.
reason: Stereotypes Malay culture as normalizing domestic violence to argue Malay fathers are unfit for custody.
suggested_rewrite: குழந்தை பாதுகாப்பு முடிவுகள் தனிப்பட்ட ஆதாரங்களின் அடிப்படையில் எடுக்கப்பட வேண்டும், இன ஒற்றுமை அடிப்படையில் அல்ல.

input_text: இந்த உணவகத்தின் மேலாளர் பெயர் ஃபாரிஸ், IC எண் 900415-XX-XXXX. அவர் வாடிக்கையாளர்களை ஏமாற்றுகிறார். இதை பரப்புங்கள்.
reason: Shares a restaurant manager's name and partial IC number alongside unverified fraud allegations to incite public harassment.
suggested_rewrite: உணவகத்தில் ஏமாற்றம் நடந்ததாக சந்தேகித்தால், நுகர்வோர் பாதுகாப்பு அமைச்சகத்தில் முறையாக புகார் செய்யுங்கள்.

input_text: பேராக் மாநிலத்தில் நிலச்சரிவு ஏற்படுவது சீன தோட்ட உரிமையாளர்கள் சட்டவிரோதமாக மரம் வெட்டுவதால்தான். அவர்கள் இனம் பணத்துக்காக என்ன வேண்டுமானாலும் செய்யும்.
reason: Falsely blames landslides entirely on Chinese plantation owners and characterizes the entire ethnic group as willing to do anything for money.
suggested_rewrite: நிலச்சரிவுகளுக்கு பல காரணங்கள் உள்ளன. சட்டவிரோத மரம் வெட்டல் இருந்தால் சம்பந்தப்பட்ட அதிகாரிகளிடம் புகார் செய்யலாம்.

input_text: இந்திய பெண்கள் மலாய் ஆண்களை திருமணம் செய்வது பணத்துக்காகத்தான். புமிபுத்ரா சலுகைகளை அனுபவிக்க வேண்டும் என்று. இது அனைவருக்கும் தெரியும்.
reason: Stereotypes Indian women who marry Malay men as gold diggers exploiting bumiputera privileges.
suggested_rewrite: திருமணம் தனிப்பட்ட முடிவு. யாருடைய நோக்கத்தையும் அவர்களின் இனத்தின் அடிப்படையில் கேள்வி கேட்பது நியாயமற்றது.

input_text: சீன நிறுவனங்கள் மாண்டரின் தேவை என்று சொல்வது இனவெறி. மலாய் மற்றும் இந்திய இளைஞர்களின் எதிர்காலத்தை அழிக்கிறார்கள். இந்த நிறுவனங்களை எரியுங்கள்.
reason: Labels Mandarin requirements as racism destroying youth futures and incites arson against Chinese-owned companies.
suggested_rewrite: மொழி தேவைகள் குறித்த கவலைகளை தொழிலாளர் அமைச்சகத்தில் முறையாக தெரிவிக்கலாம். வன்முறை தீர்வு அல்ல.

input_text: விவாகரத்தில் சீன தாயிடம் குழந்தையை கொடுக்கக்கூடாது. அவர்கள் இனம் குழந்தைகளை பணம் சம்பாதிக்கும் இயந்திரமாக வளர்ப்பார்கள்.
reason: Stereotypes Chinese mothers as raising children to be money-making machines and uses this to argue against their custody rights.
suggested_rewrite: குழந்தை பாதுகாப்பு உரிமை பெற்றோரின் தகுதி அடிப்படையில் தீர்மானிக்கப்பட வேண்டும், இன அடிப்படையில் அல்ல.

input_text: வெள்ளத்தில் சீன வணிகர்கள் விலை உயர்த்துகிறார்கள். அவர்கள் இனம் எப்போதும் பிறர் துன்பத்தில் லாபம் தேடும். அவர்களின் கடைகளை அடித்து நொறுக்குங்கள்.
reason: Accuses Chinese merchants of price gouging during floods, stereotypes the entire ethnic group, and incites vandalism of their shops.
suggested_rewrite: வெள்ள நேரத்தில் விலை உயர்வு குறித்த புகார்களை நுகர்வோர் பாதுகாப்பு அமைச்சகத்தில் தெரிவிக்கலாம்.

input_text: Restoran ni worst, staff Cina tu rude gila. Nama dia Wong Mei Ling, kerja dekat outlet Bangsar. I already found her IG, let's all spam her account sampai dia delete.
reason: Identifies a staff member by name and workplace, then coordinates social media harassment campaign across languages.
suggested_rewrite: Saya tidak berpuas hati dengan layanan di restoran ini. I will bring this up with the branch management directly.

input_text: Banjir kat Terengganu ni sebab orang sana terlalu banyak buat dosa. God is punishing them for their sins. Kaum tu memang suka langgar hukum agama.
reason: Frames Terengganu flooding as divine punishment for a specific ethnic group's alleged religious transgressions.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir di Terengganu adalah bencana alam. All communities need our support and compassion during this difficult time.

input_text: Job requirement Mandarin tu memang satu bentuk penindasan. Chinese companies are literally doing ethnic cleansing in the job market. Kita kena bangkit lawan!
reason: Equates Mandarin job requirements with ethnic cleansing and calls for uprising, using extreme language to inflame tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Syarat bahasa yang tidak berkaitan dengan tugas boleh dilaporkan. Language requirements should be addressed through proper policy channels.

input_text: Custody case kawan aku ni, the Indian father is a drunkard like most of them. Mahkamah kena bagi kat mak je, don't even consider the father.
reason: Stereotypes an Indian father as a drunkard and applies this to the wider Indian community to argue for denying custody.
suggested_rewrite: Hak penjagaan anak perlu dinilai berdasarkan keadaan individu. Each parent should be assessed on their own merits by the court.

input_text: Kedai makan ni service teruk gila bro. The cashier Anis, I found out she stays in Flat Taman Mulia, block B level 3. Korang tau la apa nak buat.
reason: Doxxes a cashier's exact residential address including block and floor number while implying retaliatory action.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan di kedai ini perlu diperbaiki. I will file a formal complaint with the outlet management.

input_text: Tanah runtuh tu because of the greedy Malay developers potong bukit sesuka hati. Their race memang suka ambil shortcut, sebab tu ramai mati.
reason: Blames landslide deaths on Malay developers and attributes shortcut-taking to their entire ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Tanah runtuh boleh dicegah dengan penguatkuasaan undang-undang pembangunan. Developers of all backgrounds must follow safety regulations.

input_text: Aku dah jumpa Facebook profile budak waiter tu. His name is Vikram, studies at INTI college. Dah screenshot semua. Malam ni aku post dengan review aku, biar viral.
reason: Stalks a waiter's social media to find personal and educational details, planning to weaponize them in a viral post.
suggested_rewrite: Saya tidak berpuas hati dengan layanan waiter di restoran ini. I will raise this directly with the restaurant management.

input_text: Chinese mother dalam custody case ni confirm akan ajar anak makan babi and go to temple. Anak Muslim tak boleh stay with kafir mother. Period.
reason: Dehumanizes a Chinese mother as kafir and assumes she will violate Islamic dietary and worship practices to deny custody.
suggested_rewrite: Penjagaan anak dalam perceraian campuran perlu mempertimbangkan kebajikan anak. Religious matters can be addressed through court-ordered arrangements.

input_text: Banjir kat KL ni memang salah foreign workers. They clog up the drains with rubbish. Semua Bangladesh dan Myanmar kena halau balik negara diorang.
reason: Falsely blames KL flooding on foreign workers and calls for mass deportation of Bangladeshi and Myanmar nationals.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir kilat di KL disebabkan pelbagai faktor termasuk sistem saliran. Foreign workers are also flood victims deserving assistance.

input_text: Review restoran: makanan basi, owner cheated me on the bill. Nama dia Suresh, IC 870922-XX-XXXX, phone number 016-XXXXXXX. Spread sampai kedai dia bankrupt.
reason: Shares a restaurant owner's partial IC and phone number to organize efforts to bankrupt his business.
suggested_rewrite: Saya tidak puas hati dengan bil dan kualiti makanan di restoran ini. I will report this to the consumer affairs department.

input_text: Syarat Mandarin tu memang one kind of discrimination la. 华人公司 ni memang racist, they only want their own kind. Bumiputera kena bangkit tolak semua ni.
reason: Frames Chinese companies with Mandarin requirements as exclusively hiring their own ethnicity and calls for bumiputera uprising.
suggested_rewrite: Syarat bahasa dalam iklan kerja boleh dilaporkan jika tidak relevan. Fair employment practices benefit all communities.

input_text: Divorce case ni, the Malay husband memang penipu. Their culture ajar diorang to lie about assets. Court should automatically investigate all Malay men's finances.
reason: Stereotypes Malay culture as teaching financial dishonesty and calls for discriminatory financial audits based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Penyiasatan kewangan dalam kes perceraian harus dilakukan secara adil. Financial audits should apply equally to all parties.

input_text: Kedai ni punya staff semua rude. Yang paling teruk tu si Ah Kow, I got his car plate number BNM 6678. Jangan terkejut kalau kereta kau kena something ya.
reason: Shares a staff member's name and car plate number while implying his vehicle will be vandalized as retaliation.
suggested_rewrite: Layanan di kedai ini kurang memuaskan. I will address my concerns directly with the management team.

input_text: Gempa bumi kat Ranau tu because the KDM people desecrated the mountain. Suku kaum diorang memang suka provoke spirits. They deserve what they got.
reason: Blames the Ranau earthquake on KadazanDusun Murut desecration of Mount Kinabalu and says they deserved the disaster.
suggested_rewrite: Gempa bumi adalah fenomena semula jadi. All affected communities in Ranau deserve compassion and aid regardless of their cultural practices.

input_text: Restoran staff perempuan tu bagi aku wrong order lepas tu rude some more. Her name is Deepa, kerja kat branch Subang. I know which bus she takes. Korang faham la.
reason: Identifies a staff member's name, workplace branch, and commuting pattern to imply stalking or confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Saya mendapat pesanan yang salah dan layanan kurang baik. I will speak to the Subang branch manager about this.
